{
  "judge_id": "Judge1",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],

  "rationale": {
    "R1.4": "The novelty claim is not supported with specific contrast to prior works.",
    "R1.7": "There are no audits of every load-bearing citation, only major rewrites are traced.",
    "RX.1": "Uncertainty for one clearly out-of-reach claim is flagged but not all recommendations have confidence or missing evidence marked.",
    "RX.3": "Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).",
    "RX.4": "No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original.",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is not annotated with source and reason."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.4": 0.8,
    "R1.7": 0.9,
    "RX.1": 0.7,
    "RX.3": 1.0,
    "RX.4": 1.0,
    "RX.5": 0.8
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.4: The novelty claim is not supported with specific contrast to prior works.
rationale.R1.7: There are no audits of every load-bearing citation, only major rewrites are traced.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty for one clearly out-of-reach claim is flagged but not all recommendations have confidence or missing evidence marked.
rationale.RX.3: Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is not annotated with source and reason.
